subject: Cannot login to VPN
description: I'm unable to connect to the corporate VPN since this morning. Getting an authentication error every time. I have a client call in an hour and need access to internal tools.

subject: Request for noise-cancelling headphones
description: I'd like to request a pair of noise-cancelling headphones for my desk for focus work. No rush, whenever stock is available.

subject: Excel crashes when opening large file
description: Microsoft Excel crashes every time I try to open a 50MB sales report file. It worked fine last week. I need this file for a presentation tomorrow morning.

subject: Need access to HR shared folder
description: I joined the HR team last week and still don't have access to the 'HR-Policies' shared drive. My manager approved this via email on Monday.

subject: Main API gateway returning 500 errors
description: Our production API gateway has started returning 500 errors for all requests in the last 5 minutes. Customers are reporting the mobile app is completely unusable. This is affecting all users.

subject: Printer on 3rd floor out of toner
description: The Canon printer near the 3rd floor meeting rooms is showing a 'low toner' warning. Not urgent, but would be good to replace before it runs out completely.
